languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, мы получили сообщение от магоса Каисы-торр-Шайга. Весьма изящным слогом он сообщает, что исследования Погонщиц дали "результат, которым он рад поделиться со своим добрым покровителем". Ваша Светлость, меня безмерно тревожит несвойственная техножрецу обходительность магоса".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, мы получили сообщение от магоса Каисы-торр-Шайга. Весьма изящным слогом он сообщает, что исследования Погонщиц дали "результат, которым он рад поделиться со своим добрым покровителем". Ваша Светлость, меня безмерно тревожит несвойственная техножрецу обходительность магоса".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

languages.text: 「閣下、マゴス・カイス＝トール＝シャイガより通信を受信いたしました。彼はきわめて優雅な言葉遣いにて、ドルーバーに関する自身の研究が『慈悲深き後援者たる閣下に共有できる成果』を得たと報告しております。閣下、率直に申し上げまして、このマゴスの礼儀正しさには大いに不安を覚えます。テック＝プリーストにしては、あまりにも異例でございます」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: 「貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|、マゴス・カイス・トル・シャイガから電報が届きました。彼は、貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|に、牧畜者に関する研究で「貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|に喜んで共有したい結果」を得たと、非常に丁寧な言葉で伝えています。貴{mf|殿|殿}|貴{mf|殿|殿}|、マゴスの礼儀正しさに、私は非常に不安を感じています。テクプリストとしては、非常に不自然なことです。」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, hemos recibido una transmisión del magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Con términos muy elegantes, informa de que su investigación sobre el Pastor ha dado "frutos que está encantado de compartir con su benevolente {mf|patrón|patrona}". Mi{mf|lord|lady}, la cortesía del magos me inquieta sobremanera. Es extremadamente impropia de un tecnosacerdote».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, hemos recibido una transmisión del magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Con términos muy elegantes, informa de que su investigación sobre el Pastor ha dado "frutos que está encantado de compartir con su benevolente {mf|patrón|patrona}". Mi{mf|lord|lady}, la cortesía del magos me inquieta sobremanera. Es extremadamente impropia de un tecnosacerdote».

languages.text: “大人，我们接收到贤者凯斯-托尔-夏迦的通讯传输。他措辞极其优雅，称对拒生花的研究已取得‘乐于与仁慈赞助人共享的成果’。大人，他这么礼貌，令我极为不安——这对一名技术神甫而言实在太反常了。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: “大人，我们接收到贤者凯斯-托尔-夏迦的通讯传输。他措辞极其优雅，称对拒生花的研究已取得‘乐于与仁慈赞助人共享的成果’。大人，他这么礼貌，令我极为不安——这对一名技术神甫而言实在太反常了。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga hat sich gemeldet. Er informiert uns wortgewandt, dass seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Treiber zu Ergebnissen geführt hat, die 'er gerne mit {mf|seinem gütigen Patron|seiner gütigen Patronin} teilen möchte. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich bin angesichts der für einen Techpriester ausgesprochen ungewöhnlichen Höflichkeit des Magos ernsthaft besorgt."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga hat sich gemeldet. Er informiert uns wortgewandt, dass seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Treiber zu Ergebnissen geführt hat, die 'er gerne mit {mf|seinem gütigen Patron|seiner gütigen Patronin} teilen möchte. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich bin angesichts der für einen Techpriester ausgesprochen ungewöhnlichen Höflichkeit des Magos ernsthaft besorgt."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga'dan bir ileti aldık. En zarif ifadelerle, Çoban üzerindeki araştırmalarının 'kibar hamisiyle paylaşmaktan memnuniyet duyacağı sonuçlar' verdiğini bildiriyor. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos'un nezaketinden son derece rahatsızım, bir Tekno Rahip için hiç alışılmadık bir durum."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga'dan bir ileti aldık. En zarif ifadelerle, Çoban üzerindeki araştırmalarının 'kibar hamisiyle paylaşmaktan memnuniyet duyacağı sonuçlar' verdiğini bildiriyor. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos'un nezaketinden son derece rahatsızım, bir Tekno Rahip için hiç alışılmadık bir durum."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons reçu une transmission du magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Il vous informe, dans des termes des plus élégants, que ses recherches sur le Chasseur ont produit "des résultats qu'il se fait une joie de partager avec son aimable {mf|protecteur|protectrice}". Votre Seigneurie... la courtoisie du magos me déconcerte au plus haut point. C'est fort inhabituel, pour un technoprêtre. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have received a transmission from Magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. In most elegant terms, he informs you that his research on the Drover has yielded 'results which he is pleased to share with his kind patron.' Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am most disturbed by the Magos's courtesy, it is extremely uncharacteristic for a Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons reçu une transmission du magos Kais-torr-Shaiga. Votre Seigneurie... la courtoisie du magos me déconcerte au plus haut point. C'est fort inhabituel, pour un technoprêtre. »
